description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:${RUBY_VERSION} Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add an rspec job that runs the before_script "bundle install" then the script "bundle exec rake spec" and executes in parallel across a matrix of RUBY_VERSION values 2.7, 3.0, 3.1, 3.2, 3.3, 3.4. Include the gitlab.com/gitlab-org/components/gem-release/gem-release component with input gem_name: gitlab_omniauth-ldap to provide deployment jobs in the deploy stage.
